Tests that the logarithm of positive zero returns negative infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.log` function in JavaScript. It verifies that the natural logarithm of positive zero (`+0`) returns `-Infinity`, which is the expected result according to the ECMAScript specification. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the condition is true, and if it is not, an error will be thrown. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its compliance with the standard.
